description: Style Note These slip-on heels from catwalk are perfect for party wear & ndash the multi-coloured glitter on the straps will complement any party dress or ethnic party ensemble. Pop these on to jazz up your outfit when you're dressing to impress. Heel: 3" Product Description Thin strips with sequin detailing along the forefoot and midfoot and an elasticated ankle strap Metallic tones footbed with a heel patch TPU outsole Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
